chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُتَفٌ وَ جَوَامِعُ مِنَ الرِّوَايَةِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 109 – In it are pointers and the concise from the reports regarding the Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (165/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (165/ 5)
text: وَلَايَةُ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) مَكْتُوبَةٌ فِي جَمِيعِ صُحُفِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ وَ لَنْ يَبْعَثَ اللَّهُ رَسُولًا إِلَّا بِنُبُوَّةِ مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ وَصِيِّهِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Wilayah of Ali<sup>asws</sup> is inscribed in the entirety of the Parchments of the Prophets, and Allah<sup>azwj</sup> never Sent a Rasool<sup>as</sup> or a Prophet<sup>as</sup> except with the Prophet-hood of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and Ali<sup>asws</sup>’ as his<sup>saww</sup> Successor<sup>asws</sup>.
en.sarwar: 6. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn Jumhur who has said that Yunus narrated to him from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from al-Fudayl ibn yasar from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most gracious has appointed Ali (a.s.) as a light house between His-self and His creatures. Whoever would recognize him he will be a believer and whoever would not recognize him will be an unbeliever. Those who would be ignorant of him they would be lost. Those who would consider others like would be Mushrik (considering those who do not have any Divine Authority as having Divine Authority). Those who would come with his Wilaya they would be admitted in paradise.
